channel.title: Hr on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Hr on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Recruiting & ATS: OpenCATS Complete Deployment Guide (2026)
item.description: Managing recruitment processes through proprietary SaaS platforms means your candidate data lives on someone else’s servers, often with limited customization and recurring subscription fees. Self-hosting an applicant tracking system (ATS) gives you full control over candidate data, custom workflows, and zero per-user licensing costs.
